PROP-01b-partial3-inv-025.text: Auction start sets timestamp to block.timestamp and approves vault relayer for full balance.
PROP-01b-partial3-inv-025.assertion: forall _onAuctionStart(asset): s_auctionStarts[asset] = block.timestamp AND approve(relayer, balance)

locations.note: line 353: s_auctionStarts[asset] = block.timestamp; then _onAuctionStart called at line 354
line 92: forceApprove(i_gpV2VaultRelayer, full balance) — implements the approval
